transcript.text:
[Today's classy meal] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Humongous]
[The crunch that breaks your hunger]
[Nonstop cutting starts now]
[Tzu-thoven dominating the symphony of donkatsu]
[A moment of inspiration... starting now!]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some donkatsu (Pork Cutlet)
I have been invited to this place and they said their portions are huge and filling
The weather's not been this good in days
A perfect day to eat some donkatsu
It's been a while since I had it It's my favorite
I'm excited
RIght over here
[Mugong Donkatsu] [Dongtan Lake Park Location]
Mu=Without Possession Gong=Hollow/Empty

Meaning "No Hunger"
[I wonder if it will fulfill Tzuyang's hunger!]
[Let's go!]
-Ah! Hello! -Hello~
-I'm a fan -Really?
I couldn't sleep last night
[Looked forward to meeting her]
[Chaotic]
[Don't know where to put myself...]
[Compliment party]
Mugong Donkatsu is our signature dish
It has bell peppers, onions, corn, cheese, etc
There's jjolmyeon (chewy noodles) that goes with it
-It's the best -Is that so?
Then I'll take 5 of those
[Clicking away]

Cheese Donkatsu as well
[The kiosk is going to break]
How are you going to eat all of that?
[I'm not finished]
Tteokboki!
Since I'm a tteokboki shop owner
As for drinks...
[1 of each...]
[Done]
[I will prepare that for you]
[Hamburg Steak] (Salisbury Steak)
[Mugong Soup Tteokboki] (Spicy Rice Cake)
[King Shrimp Soba] (Cold Buckwheat Noodles with Broth)
[And last but not least]
[The fried goods]
[Mugong Donkatsu's special meal]

[Order #68]
[Hard to fit everything in the camera]
They're all out now
This is the Mugong Donkatsu
This is cheese donkatsu
And hamburg steak
Menchi-Katsu (deep-fried ground meat patty)
Tteokboki
King Shrimp Soba
Giant Calamari
So big
[That's squid...?]
This is their main item It's so big
Right?
[Humongous]
Very thick too

Should I take a bite like this?
That's so good
It just melted in my mouth
I ate that much already
What's inside?
-Cheese, sweet corn, bell peppers -Bell peppers?!
The inside is completely filled with ingredients
She's soooooo pretty
[Chit-Chat time]
Come over here
[Gets dragged out]
Thank you
The inside is so soft because of this
Look at this So cool
Lots of vegetables, but it's still good
A big piece

The sauce is so good
I never had donkatsu with so many ingredients
I think those who don't like veggies would still enjoy this dish
Completely filled
Stir-fried kimchi and rice Rice should pair well with this!
Jjolmyeon here too (Spicy chewy noodles)
Donkatsu and Jjolmyeon?
This is 1 bite for me
[Applauds]
You're so good at eating
[Calm down...]
Next,
I really want to try this side
The calamari is huge
[Humongous]
Handcrafted calamari

The squid meat itself is really big
The squid is enormous
[Wait here]
I wanted to try a bite of everything But I keep eating more than a bite
Tteokboki here
I know my tteokboki
[Let's try it]
This is exactly what I like
A taste everyone is familiar with
Everybody would love this
Donkatsu and Tteokboki go well together
So tasty
Wait
With calamari
And dip
Amazing

This is incredible
[Can be spicy for those who aren't good with spicy]
When it's too spicy
Maemil Guksu (Buckwheat Noodles)
Looks good
Some soup
Delicious
You can't really go wrong with this either
Everything here is delicious
There isn't one near my house I hope they make 1
Can you please make 1?
King shrimp drenched in broth is the way to go too
Some rice
Great combo
Donkatsu is so tender
Hamburg steak

I like these too
It's very soft
So juicy
Meat juice
This is crazy
This is really, really good
I love the soft texture it has
The juiciness is crazy
Love the meat and the sauce
Burdock?
Radish leaves?
[Bye[
Kids would love this
I would've asked for this all the time as a kid
Break it up
With sauce

I wasn't expecting much at first But it's excellent
That thickness
You see this?
As a whole
There are so many ingredients
This is really filling
Half of this is almost like 1 donkatsu
I'm already finished with 2
Last bite of the steak
This should be eaten with a fried egg
Cheese donkatsu
Majestic
Girls love this Guys do too, but
This is the good cheese
Some cheese don't have much flavor
This is really savory

What?
One of the best cheese I've ever had
Why is it so good? Is something wrong with my tastebud?
With some wasabi
It's almost like a very tasty cheese stick
Like seasoned cheese?
There's a misconception that donkatsu restaurants use the same cheese
These are really delicious
[Gets dragged out again]
[Gotta eat the salad, right?]
Not bad Refreshing
There's still an item I haven't tried yet
Menchi-katsu
What is this made out of?
That's pork sirloin
It's all handmade We season and deep fry it

You 2 look very similar
-We are mother & daughter -Really?
No wonder!
We stayed up until 3am
From the nervousness
My daughter is a huge fan
[Still can't believe it]
I went to a restaurant you went before
Really? Where?
[Uploaded on 2021.12.16] Webfoot octopus noodles
It was so good
That's a relief
These donkatsu taste better
[Thank you so much]
Cut it
Just like donkatsu

This is pork
And bits of vegetables
Very soft and tender just like a deep-fried hamburg steak
It's good dipped in this sauce
Everything's tasty
Nicely
Look how filled it is
Watching you eat makes me want to eat
Stir-fried kimchi tastes good too
Get it as a whole
It's good when it's fresh and crispy
Drenched with sauce is delicious too
One bite of the rice
Some more calamari
It tastes so good
How is it this soft?

The batter itself is very thin
Almost like bread crumbs with squid meat
Tteokboki is good too Let's eat some more
There are yaki mandu (fried dumplings) in here too How am I just noticing it?
It's still crispy Tteokboki is yummy
The real ones taste good cold
Spicy
Cheese topping on this would be perfect
First time eating rice with tteokboki
It's on your sleeve
When did this happen?!
[It's okay. This happens all the time]
Shrimp
Drenched in soup
Soggy ones are good too like Tonkatsu Nabe
Incredible

Menchi-katsu
Egg yolk
All over
Whole egg in 1 bite
[Nope]
I did it
Menchi-katsu with yolk egg
With a little bit of wasabi
I don't really like eating rice
But this stir-fried kimchi makes it great
Macaroni
Stir-fried kimchi
Jjolmyeon
They go well together
Donkatsu goes well with everything here
[The beverages surprise me more every ime]

I only had 5 so far
Some more cheese
A little bit of wasabi on top
The cheese is everything
It's so flavorful It's weird. Why is it like this?
Some parts are only meat
The middle is a perfect cordon bleu
The end is more like a regular pork cutlet
The meat itself is so tasty
With some wasabi
It's good
Amazing
I don't really say that I'm full
Worker: (gasp)
[Shocked that she finished everything]
Our donkatsu is 1.5x bigger than normal ones

So it's gotta be like 14~15 of the normal-sized ones total
This place lives up to its name I feel filled and full
Last one!
[Finished]
Amazing
[Seeing is not always believing]
Thank you for enjoying our food
It was really good
[Let's see...]
[7 cans of soda]
First off...
[Says the name wrong]
[Let's try that again]
I had their donkatsu today
Their donkatsu itself was really big and filling
It had lots of tasty ingredients inside

I'm sure the kids would love the hamburg steak here
And the cheese donkatsu for the ladies
Thanks everyone~
[Extra footage]
[Here's a gift]
-You are so good at eating -Thank you
-Is this donkatsu? -Yes
[Thank you so much for the gift]
There won't be any hunger for me
There's a letter inside
"Enjoy the food, it was truly an honor. Thank you"
We are more thankful
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Geumbit Regional Childrens' Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
